case_title: COLUM PARKE MORGAN VS. STUART WAH-KAM LEUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF COLUM PARKE MORGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STUART WAH-KAM LEUNG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF HAD A COPY OF HIS PROOF OF SERVICE AND DEFENDANT CONFIRMED SERVICE. SERVICE IS 1 DAY UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STUART WAH-KAM
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, COLUM PARKE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STUART WAH-KAM
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-01-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-01-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, COLUM PARKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, STUART WAH-KAM $2,897.14 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,947.14, RENT FROM JAN 21, 2020 - FEB 09 2020 = $897.14. PENALTY FOR VIOLATING CCC 789.3 FOR 20 DAYS FROM JAN 21-020 - FEB-09, 2020 $100 PER DAY X 20 = $2000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,268.11 FILED BY MORGAN, COLUM PARKE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STUART WAH-KAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
